title: Sasa igagoyeana
taxonomy: Sasa igagoyeana is classified as a species of bamboo. It belongs to the family Poaceae and the genus Sasa. Sasa igagoyeana is a type of evergreen bamboo, native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The species is characterized by its small to medium-sized culms and slender leaves. As part of the bamboo family, Sasa igagoyeana is an important component of its native ecosystem.
